prompts:

basically i want you guys to be grinind away constinatly...  getting thorugh the teas.. thinking around the problems...   and i just check in and get a daily report... i thought we built this?    its anoying that the server keeps restarting 1-2 a day which kills you... not sure about the other team...  need to find a solution..

i dont know.. ask the libaraian..
